name: cogito
description: A metacognitive operating protocol with durable, self-maintaining memory. Bundles the cogito-protocol skill (assumptions, three-layer analysis, state files, the runnable verification gate, the lessons ledger + consolidate/decay maintenance, the CoALA memory taxonomy, the finish-line review) plus the adaptive-learning, web-build-loop and cogito-consolidate skills, the cogito-reviewer, design-qa, deploy-verifier, site-handoff-checker, seo-auditor, project-archaeologist and secrets-scanner subagents, and the SessionStart hooks that load the lessons ledger into every session, in any repo.
